name: MIXED EPITHELIAL AND STROMAL TUMOR
definition: MEST = LEIOMYOMATOUS RENAL HAMARTOMA = CYSTIC HAMARTOMA OF RENAL PELVIS = ADULT

demographics.Path: benign complex solid + cystic renal tumor
demographics.Histo: › stromal spindle cells mimicking ovarian stroma with estrogen + progesterone

dominant_finding: cystic region with T1 hypointensity + T2 hyperintensity
discriminating_features: well-circumscribed expansile multiseptate complex (= cystic and solid) mass
variable contrast enhancement of intervening septa

general: well-circumscribed expansile multiseptate complex (= cystic and solid) mass
variable contrast enhancement of intervening septa
MR: cystic region with T1 hypointensity + T2 hyperintensity
nodular component T1 hyperintense + T2 hypointense
